changes.summary: Removed useWithdraw and useTransfer mutation stubs that called trpc.wallets.withdraw / trpc.wallets.transfer (permanent NOT_IMPLEMENTED). Added module comment documenting canonical UI paths: publications.withdraw (useWithdrawFromPublication in useVotes.ts) and meritTransfer.* (MeritTransferDialog / use-merit-transfers.ts).
No edit — file already removed upstream (a9583ced chore(web): remove unused components). Static import graph confirmed it never imported useWallet or wallet withdraw/transfer stubs.

notes: PostSettingsReadOnly was in write_set from phase-0 static analysis but had no wallet stub edges and was deleted before this unit; PostPageClient uses PostInvestingSettingsReadOnly instead.
